reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
여행떠나는 전날 도착해서 바로 들고 출발❤️
우선 코인칩 시리즈별로 다 먹여본 결과
기호성이 다 좋아서 고민없이
새로운 시리즈가 나온다 했을때
구매의사가 있었습니다!
.
.일단 향부터가 제가 먹고 싶었습니다!
인위적이지 않고 순수한 고기냄새🧡
아이들이 좋아할 수 밖에 없는 듯해요!!!!
.
다른 시리즈보다 바삭바삭해서
ASMR이 장난 없습니다!💛
라온이는 바삭한 식감을 좋아합니다.
씹으면서 눈빛이 아주 초롱초롱해요!!!
.
그리고 이번에 바뀐 봉투도 너무 마음에 듭니다!!!
reviews.content_en:
Arrived the day before our trip and took it right away with us ❤️
After trying all the COIN CHIP series by flavor,
since all of them had great palatability,
I was definitely ready to buy without hesitation
whenever a new series came out!
.
.First of all, even the scent made me want to try it!
Not artificial at all, just pure meat smell 🧡
The pups can't help but love it!!!!
.
It's crunchier than the other series,
so the ASMR is no joke! 💛
Raon loves the crispy texture.
Her eyes just sparkle when she chews it!!!
.
And I'm really happy about the new packaging design too!!!

reviews.name: 구름도담
reviews.content:
💗미리 맛본 개사원 리뷰💗
(구매 TIP! 도담이는 까까조아 강지~ 알러지가 없어서 간식을 고르는데 자유로운 편이지만 일등 도담픽은 고기간식이예요!)
보호자가 먹이기에 기존 코인칩보다 밝은색이고 비프는 좀 힘 줘서 부숴야 했는데 포크는 작은 힘에도 잘 부숴져서 쪼개 주기 좋았어요!! 부담없이 산책할때나 외출할때 가져가서 주기 좋은 간식 왕추천💗
그리고 이런 칩간식은 부스러기가 많은편인데 코인칩 포크는 부스러기가 하~~~~~나도 없어서 너무 좋았어요!
reviews.content_en:
💗Employee taste test review ahead 💗
(SHOPPING TIP! Dotam is picky about treats - no allergies so I have freedom choosing snacks, but her #1 pick is always meat treats!)
As the caregiver, it's a lighter color than the original COIN CHIP, and the beef needed some force to break, but the pork breaks apart so easily with just a little force that it's perfect for breaking into pieces! Great snack to bring on walks or outings without worry 💗
And while chip treats usually have a lot of crumbs, the COIN CHIP Pork has basically zero crumbs, which is amazing!

reviews.name: 임****
reviews.content: 바잇미 코인칩 포크맛💕 냄새가 너무 고소하고 바삭바삭해서 순삭해버렸어요! 기존에 소고기맛도 너무 잘먹었는데 포크맛도 잘먹어요!!! 변경된 지퍼백 패키지 보관할때도 넘 좋네요!
reviews.content_en: BITE ME COIN CHIP Pork flavor 💕 The smell is so savory and crispy that it disappeared in no time! My pup loved the original beef flavor too, and she's equally obsessed with the pork! 💕 The new ziplock package is super convenient for storage too!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
진도믹스 9갤 강쥐를 키우는 테리맘입니다•.•
평소 저희 강쥐는 은근 입맛이 까다로와서 먹어보지 않았던 간식은 잘 먹지도 않고 관심이 없습니다 ㅠ.ㅠ
근데 신기하게도 부스팅코인칩은 주자마자 거부 반응 없이 
챱챱 소리 내며 엄청 잘 먹었어요!
엄마 마음 완죠니 뿌듯+.+
코인칩 비프 성분은 멸치, 병아리콩 외에도 소화 도움되는 
성분도 같이 들어있다고 해요! 
저희 강쥐는 한참 뛰어놀 시기라 슬개골에 혹시 문제가 생길까 조마조마한데 뼈 건강이랑 성장 발육에도 좋다고 하니 평소에도 꾸준히 급여해보려구요!
무엇보다 방부제랑 첨가물 없다는 문구가 안심이 되었어요!
코인칩 향은 제가 느끼기에도 맛있을 것 같은 육포+오징어 스멜이 납니다 ㅎㅎ 역시 바잇미는 사랑입니다•.•
reviews.content_en:
I'm Terry Mom, raising a 9-year-old Jindo mix who's quite the picky eater 🐕
Normally, my strong-willed pup won't eat treats she hasn't tried before and shows no interest ㅠ.ㅠ
But amazingly, she chowed down on BOOSTING COIN CHIP right away without any hesitation,
making those happy crunching sounds! 😋
Mom's heart is so full and proud! +.+
I heard the beef COIN CHIP contains anchovies and chickpeas, plus ingredients that help with digestion!
My pup is at that age where she's constantly running around and I worry about her patellar health, so hearing that it's good for bone health and growth makes me want to give it to her regularly!
Most importantly, I felt reassured seeing "no preservatives or additives"!
The COIN CHIP scent smells like jerky + squid to me, something I'd definitely enjoy too hehe 😄 BITE ME is truly love 🐾.🐾

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content:
강아지 생일 전에 빠르게 도착해서 준비 잘할 수 있었어용
빠른 배송 감사해용!! 강아지가 새로운 간식이여서 잘먹더라구용
바삭바삭 맛있게 잘 먹었숩니다!! 좋은 간식 마니 만들어주세용
바잇미 아이템들 넘 다 좋아용!!!!🤍🤍🤍🤍🤍💜💜💜💜
reviews.content_en:
It arrived quickly before my pup's birthday so I could prepare well~
Thanks for the fast shipping! 🚚 Since it was a new treat for my dog, she ate it right up~ 🐕
She enjoyed the crunchy snack so well! Please keep making good treats like this~
I love all the BITE ME items!!!! 🤍🤍🤍🤍🤍💜💜💜

reviews.name: 잰****
reviews.content: 치킨, 덕, 비프에 이어서 포크가 새로 나와서 구매해봤습니다. 기호성이 4가지 다 만점이네요! 그리고 손으로도 부담없이 쪼개져서 중형견 소형견 다 잘 먹어요ㅎㅎ 와작와작 부담없이 먹어서 견주로서 손이 자주 가는 간식이네요!
reviews.content_en: After chicken, duck, and beef, pork came out new so I tried it. All 4 flavors get perfect scores for palatability! And it breaks apart so easily by hand that both medium and small breeds enjoy it well hehe The easy, stress-free crunching makes me reach for this treat all the time as a dog parent!

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content:
잘게 쪼개서 먹는게 귀엽네요~
요런 바삭한 종류의 간식은 처음인데도 잘 먹어요.
눈건강에 좋다고 하니까 더 사줘야겠어요
reviews.content_en:
It's cute how she breaks off little pieces to eat~
Even though it's her first time with this crunchy type of treat, she eats it well.
Hearing it's good for eye health makes me want to buy more!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 코인칩 정말 좋아헤요! 고기들어간 거 좋아하는 강아지면 기호성 문제없어요
reviews.content_en: I really love COIN CHIP! If your pup likes treats with meat, there's no issue with palatability at all~

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
이 세상 바삭거림이 아닙니다...
영양가👍🏻 기호성👍🏻 바삭바삭 식감👍🏻
요즘 저희 강아지 원픽 간식으로 등극했어요!!!
reviews.content_en:
The crunchiness in this world is unmatched...
Nutrition 👍🏻 Palatability 👍🏻 Crispy texture 👍🏻
It's become my pup's #1 snack choice these days!!!

reviews.name: 상****
reviews.content: 너무 조아해서 달라고 난리에요ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ자기주장 강한 강지인데 요즘 젤 조아하는 간식으로 등극해서 하루도 빠짐없이 먹이고 있어용
reviews.content_en: She loves it so much she keeps asking for more hahahaha 😂 My pup has a strong personality, but this treat has become her absolute favorite lately, so I'm giving it to her every single day~

reviews.name: 남****
reviews.content: 워낙 고기를 좋아하는 애들인데, 코인칩은 고기함량이 많아서인지 애들이 환장하고 먹네요!ㅎ 가격이 좀 있는 편이지만 레트로한 포장디자인도 귀엽고 애들이 좋아해서 나중에 행사하면 또 사주고 싶어요ㅎ
reviews.content_en: My pups really love meat, and they go crazy for COIN CHIPS since it has so much meat in it! 😄 It's a bit pricey, but the retro packaging design is cute and the kids love it, so I definitely want to buy it again when there's a sale!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 남의집가서 얻어먹고 또 달라고 찡찡이되서 어디꺼냐고 물어봤던 간식이에요,, 뽀개줄수있는 넘 좋은 까까로 애기들이 넘 좋아해요🥺
reviews.content_en: I got some at someone else's house and kept begging for more, so I had to ask where they got it from,, It's such a great treat that you can break apart and the pups absolutely love it! 🥺

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
칩형태라서 굿굿
다견가정에서 하나로 나눠주기도 좋아요
바삭한 육포하드와소프트의 경계ㅎㅎ
기호성 갑 최고!
reviews.content_en:
Great because it's in chip form
Also perfect for sharing one with multiple dogs in the household
That sweet spot between crispy jerky - hard and soft 😄
Palate appeal is A+ the best!

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content: 잘 먹어서 벌써 세네번 주문한 거 같아요
reviews.content_en: He eats it so well that I think I've already ordered it three or four times

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
코인칩은 제가 맡아봐도 맛있는 치킨 향이 솔솔 나요.
저희 강아지는 간식을 가리는 편인데 바잇미 코인칩은 엄청 좋아하는 편입니다 ㅎ 
동전 사이즈고 보통은 쪼갰을 때 부스러기가 많이 생기기 마련인데 부스러기도 거의 없이 깔끔하게 쪼개집니다 ㅎ
건강에 좋은 성분들에 방부제도 안 들어가 있어서 더 안심이 돼요.
오도독 씹는 소리가 너무 귀여워요!
reviews.content_en:
I even smelled COIN CHIPS myself and there's a nice savory chicken scent 😊
My pup is picky about treats, but he absolutely loves BITE ME COIN CHIPS 😄
They're coin-sized and usually when you break them apart you get a lot of crumbles, but these break apart cleanly with barely any crumbs 😄
With healthy ingredients and no preservatives, it's even more reassuring.
The crunchy chewing sound is so adorable!

reviews.name: 비단결이
reviews.content:
💗미리 맛본 개사원 리뷰💗
(구매 TIP! 결이는 나름 호불호가 강한 강아지라서 너무 딱딱하거나 고기가 아닌 간식은 불호! 고기 만땅 간식을 좋아하는 강지랍니다~)
코인칩은 역시 코인칩 ,,, 보자마자 환장하고 좋아해요 패키지 색깔이 귀여워서 색깔별로 놔두고 주고 싶어요 그리고 ASMR 하기 좋은 간식입니다^^ 그냥 잘 먹어서 너무 잘 먹어요 ..... 좋아해요라고 밖에 할 말이 없슴다 !!!!!!!!!!
reviews.content_en:
💗Pre-tasted staff review 💗
(BUYING TIP! Gyeol-i is a pup with pretty strong taste preferences - not a fan of anything too hard or non-meat treats! He loves meat-packed snacks~)
COIN CHIPS are just... COIN CHIPS!!! He goes absolutely nuts the moment he sees them. The package colors are so cute I want to keep them organized by color and give them out. Plus it's great for ASMR content^^ He just eats so well... I literally have nothing to say except that he loves them!!!!!!!!!

reviews.name: 남****
reviews.content: 유미가 제일 좋아하는 간식인 코인칩! 저번에 코인칩 치킨 맛 먹었을 때도 엄청 잘먹어서 한봉지 금방 순삭했었는데 이번에도 역시 순삭예정이에요! 코인칩에 원물이 눈에 보이는 것도 좋고 무엇보다도 애기가 먹었을 때 바삭한 식감과 얘껴먹고싶어서 손으로 뿌셔서 작게 주려고 뿌셔봤는데 잘 뿌셔져서 좋았어요!! 다먹으면 재구매 할거에요!
reviews.content_en: COIN CHIPS is Yumi's favorite treat! When she had the chicken flavor last time, she ate it so well that the whole bag was gone in no time, and this time will definitely be the same! It's great that you can see the real ingredients in the COIN CHIPS, and most importantly when my pup eats it - the crispy texture is amazing, and since she wants to keep eating I tried breaking it into smaller pieces by hand and it breaks apart perfectly! I'll definitely reorder once it's all gone!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
배송도 빠르고 휴먼그레이드로 성분도 좋아요.
냄새 너무 좋아요ㅋㅋㅋ 사람이 먹고 싶을 정도로
강아지가 냄새맡고 미쳐요 재구매각입니당
에너지 부스터라 산책 전 후로 먹으면 좋을거 같아요.
reviews.content_en:
Fast shipping and great human-grade ingredients.
The smell is amazing 😄 Good enough that I want to eat it myself!
My pup goes crazy smelling it and definitely wants to reorder 👍
Since it's an energy booster, it'd be great to give before and after walks.

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 입이 진짜 엄청 짧은 앤데 까서 주자마자 잘먹길래 놀랐어요 바작바작 먹는 소리가 듣기 좋아서 제가 계속 주고싶을정도였어욯ㅎㅎ거진 asmr급ㅎㅎ 기호성도 좋고 첨가제,방부제 안들어있어서 성분 깔끔하고! 최고최고!!
reviews.content_en: My pup has a really short attention span but he ate it right away when I opened it, and I was so surprised! The crunchy munching sound is so satisfying that I kept wanting to give him more 😄 Pretty much ASMR level 😄 Great palatability and no additives or preservatives, so the ingredients are super clean! Top notch!!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 넘 맛있게 잘 먹네요~~ 엄청 바삭하고 맛있나봐요 다먹고 재구매 할께요
reviews.content_en: He eats it so well and deliciously~~ It must be really crispy and tasty! I'll reorder once it's all gone

reviews.name: 나****
reviews.content: 코인칩노란봉투만 들어도 신나서 부르지않아도 옵니다..ㅎㅎ입맛이 까다로워서 실패한 간식들이 많거든요.인친님피드보고 구매했는데 우리배추입맛에 맞는 코인칩발견해서 제가 더 신나요!
reviews.content_en: Just hearing the yellow COIN CHIP bag makes him so excited, he comes running without me even calling! 😄 He's been picky with treats and we've had a lot of failures, but I saw it on a friend's feed and decided to try it. Finding COIN CHIP that matches Baechu's taste buds made me even happier!

reviews.name: 전****
reviews.content: 코인칩 넘 귀여워요! 사람 과자같아요.ㅎㅎ 잘먹더라구요. 입짧은 친정멍이꺼!
reviews.content_en: COIN CHIP is so cute! 😄 They look just like human snacks. He's eating them so well. My mom's picky pup here!

reviews.name: 임****
reviews.content:
코인칩 떨어지면 불안한거 저만 그런거 아니죠?? ㅎ ㅎ 
치킨은 기존 오리나 비프 보단 좀 딱딱해요 이빨 안좋은 아이들은 오리나 비프가 더 나을꺼 같아요
reviews.content_en: Is it just me that gets anxious when COIN CHIP runs out?? 😄 The chicken flavor is a bit crunchier compared to the duck or beef. For pups with sensitive teeth, duck or beef might be better!

reviews.name: 강****
reviews.content:
개봉하자마자 너무잘먹고
ASMR제대루예요! 아그작아그작 넘맛있게씹어먹네요~
모양도귀엽고 포장도넘귀여워요
reviews.content_en: He started eating right after I opened the package and the ASMR is spot on! Crunching away so happily~ 😋 The shape is adorable and the packaging is super cute too!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
기존부터 코인칩 러버입니다
포크맛 신상도 잘 먹더라구요
단백질 풍부하고 몸에 좋아서 주기적으로 급여하고 있어요!
변 상태도 좋고 오도독 소리 내면서 먹는 것도 너무 귀여워요
reviews.content_en: I've been a COIN CHIP fan from way back. He loves the new pork flavor too! It's packed with protein and good for his health, so I give it to him regularly. His digestion is great and it's so cute watching him crunch away with those little sounds! 🐕

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content:
돼기 고기로 된 간식은 처음 줘 보는데 너무 잘 먹어요!̆̈ 
다 먹으면 또 구매해서 먹일 거 같아요
좋은 가격에 잘 구매했습니당 :)
그리고 패키지가 너무 예뻐욤♥
reviews.content_en: This is the first time trying a pork-based treat and he absolutely loves it! 😍 I'm pretty sure I'll buy it again once he finishes these. Got it at a great price too! :) And the packaging is absolutely adorable ♥

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 동그랗고 얇아서 주기도 간편하고 먹기도 편한 간식이라 맘에 들어요. 기호성도 엄청 좋고 성분도 믿을 수 있어 만족해요.
reviews.content_en: They're round and thin so they're convenient to give and easy for him to eat. The shape is great! The palatability is amazing and I'm confident in the ingredients, so I'm really happy with this purchase.

reviews.name: D****
reviews.content: 이거 진짜 애들이 엄청 좋아해요. 생긴것도 사람도 먹고싶게 생겨서 포장도 이쁘고 사람 과자같아요. 또 시키려구요.
reviews.content_en: The pups absolutely love these! They look so appetizing that even people would want to eat them—the packaging is pretty and they look just like human snacks. Definitely ordering again!

reviews.name: 남****
reviews.content: 입맛 까다로워서 진짜 맛있는 간식 아니면 안 먹는데 코인칩 치킨은 주자마자 잘 먹어용ㅎㅎ기호성이 아주 좋습니당!!! 그리고 먹을 때 오독오독 소리 나는 게 귀여워요 HACCP 인증받은 간식이라 안전하게 먹일 수 있어서 좋네요👍
reviews.content_en: He's really picky and won't eat treats unless they're actually delicious, but he started eating the COIN CHIP chicken right away! 😄 The palatability is fantastic!!! And the little crunching sounds while he eats are so adorable. Plus it's HACCP certified so I feel good giving it to him safely 👍

reviews.name: j****
reviews.content: 처음 시켜보는 거라 걱정 조금 했는데 왠걸 너무 잘 먹어요 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: I was a bit worried since it was my first time ordering, but wow, he loves it! 😄

reviews.name: 송****
reviews.content: 기호성 너무 좋아요 ㅎㅎ 치킨, 연어 등등 시리즈도 나왔으면 좋겠네요!
reviews.content_en: Palatability is amazing! 😄 I hope they release other flavors like chicken and salmon too!

reviews.name: 손****
reviews.content:
아이가 너무 잘먹어요! 닭가슴살 급여하기 번거로웠는데 스낵타입으로 나와서 편하네요👍🏻 저희 아이는 물론이고 입맛까다로운 친구도 너무 잘먹었어요 기호성 끝내주네요~~
부산물 없이 닭가슴살 그대로 들어가 있어서 마음에 들었고 눈에 좋은 단호박, 당근까지 챙길 수 있어서 일석이조에요 바잇미 코인칩 강추합니다!
reviews.content_en: My pup loves it so much! It was such a hassle to feed chicken breast, but having it in snack form is so convenient 👍🏻 Not only my dog but even my picky eater friend loved it! The palatability is incredible~~ I really appreciated that it's pure chicken breast with no by-products, and it's a win-win since we can also get good nutrition for the eyes with sweet pumpkin and carrots. Highly recommend BITE ME Coin Chips!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 코인칩 진짜 잘먹어요 기호성 짱입니다 되게 바삭해보이는데 크기도 너무 작지않아서 좋고 기름지거나 냄새가 없어서 더 좋네요
reviews.content_en: The coin chips are seriously loved! Palatability is top-notch 👌 They look really crispy and the size isn't too small which is great, plus they're not greasy or smelly so even better!

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 역시 소고기.. 기호성 최고 ㅎㅎㅎ 넘 잘먹어요 ㅋㅋ 생각보다 크기가 좀 있어요! 삼키로 말티쥬는 하루에 한 개만 주려구용 💚
reviews.content_en: Beef is the best after all... highest palatability 😄😄😄 My pup eats it so well! The size is bigger than I expected! I'm planning to give Maltese just one coin chip a day 💚

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content:
이름 그대루 코인싸이즈의 간식이에요!😋
봉투에 지퍼팩 처리되있어서 휴대하여 다니기
넘넘 좋구여! 과자가 부스러지지않고
단단해서 주기 편해요! 
맛도 넘 좋은지 저희강아지가 개🐶좋아해요ㅋㅋㅋ
추천이용🧡먹고 또 사먹을꺼에욧ㅎㅎ맛나요😋
reviews.content_en: True to its name - it's a coin-sized snack! 😋 The pouch has a ziplock so it's super convenient to carry around! The treat doesn't crumble and stays firm so it's easy to give! The taste is so good too, our puppy absolutely loves it 🐶😄😄😄 Highly recommend! 🧡 We're gonna keep buying it!😋

reviews.name: 손****
reviews.content:
하나가 꽤 커서 여러 조각으로 나눠서 노즈워크 장난감에 넣어줬어요
맛있나봐요 엄청 열심히 찾아먹어요
reviews.content_en: One piece is pretty big so I break it into smaller pieces and put it in a sniffing toy. Seems delicious - my pup searches for it so enthusiastically!

reviews.name: a****
reviews.content: 오독오독 잘 씹어먹어요. 냄새 맡곤 냉큼 물어가네요.ㅋㅋ신상 언제 사보나 했는데 할인할 때 좋은 기회에 구매해봤어요. 만족합니다.
reviews.content_en: Crunches and chews so well. As soon as she smells it, she grabs it right away 😄 I was wondering when new items would come out, and I got the chance to buy it during a discount. Very satisfied!

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content:
열자마자 엄청 맛있는 냄새가 …!!! 강쥐들이 환장 할 냄새에오! 크기도 한입에 먹고 좋고 딱딱해서 꽤 오래 먹더라구요!
고기냄새가 엄청 나는데 야채도 듬뿍 들었다고 하니 .. 넘 만족합니다 ღ
reviews.content_en: The second I opened it, there was an amazing smell...!!! The dogs absolutely went crazy for it! The size is perfect for one bite and it's so hard that they actually chew on it for quite a while! It has a strong meat smell and apparently packed with veggies too... very satisfied ღ

reviews.name: n****
reviews.content: 시바견 세이디 인스타보고 구매했어요 :-) 입맛이 까다로워서 실패하는 간식이 많은 편인데 우리배추가 맛있는지 진짜 잘먹네요! 총알배송도 감사해요 :D
reviews.content_en: I bought it after seeing it on my Shiba Inu Sadie's Instagram 😊 My pup is picky and often rejects treats, but Baechoo is eating this really well! Also thank you for the super fast shipping :D

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 포장 뜯는것부터 깔끔하게 뜯을 수 있고 바삭바삭한 식감에 아이들이 너무 맛있게 잘 먹어요!! 원물도 다 확인 할 수 있어 안심하고 먹일 수 있어 좋았습니다! 성분도 좋고 기호성도 좋고! 댕댕이 눈건강을 위한 영양만점 간식으로 강추하고 싶어요!!
reviews.content_en: The packaging opens cleanly and with the crispy texture, my pups eat it so deliciously!! I can see all the original ingredients so I feel confident feeding it to them! Great ingredients, great palatability! I'd love to highly recommend this nutrient-packed treat for puppy eye health!!

reviews.name: 안****
reviews.content:
정말 잘먹어요 
가로세로 금이 가져있어서 부숴서 주기도 좋네요
계속 구비할것같아욥!
reviews.content_en: She really loves eating it! The cracks running across make it easy to break apart and give to her. I'll definitely keep stocking up! 😊

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 알러지 많은 아가인데, 먹어도 눈물 안터지고 몸 알러지 반응도 없어서 너무 좋았어요 :) ! 무엇보다, 식감이 오독오독 소리가 나는 식감이라 하나먹으면 또 달라하고 기호성이 넘 좋아요 ㅎㅎ 먹을때 표정도 달라진답니댜 🫶🏻
reviews.content_en: My pup has a lot of allergies, but she doesn't get teary eyes or any allergic reactions after eating this, which is amazing :)! Plus, the crispy texture that goes crunch crunch is so addictive - she asks for more after eating just one, and her preference for it is off the charts ㅎㅎ Her facial expression even changes when she eats it 🫶🏻

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content:
소고기냄새가 아주 찐하게 나네용
아이들이 넘 좋아합니당ㅎ
reviews.content_en: The beef smell is really strong! The kids love it so much ㅎ

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
🐷오늘 오픈된 바잇미 신상 포크 코인칩🐷

이미 다른맛들로 검증된 바잇미 코인칩 간식인데 신상맛이 나왔더라구요????
진짜...바삭바삭한 식감에 오도독 씹어먹는 식감이 asmr저리가라 너무 귀엽잖아요!!!
기호성도 최고에다가 국내산 돼지고기까지 듬뿍 든 이번 바잇미코인칩 신상품 🫶🏻
진짜 다른맛도 다 맛있는데 신상도 너무 맛있어보이는 .... 5/26(금) 오픈기념으로 선착순 할인까지 진행된다고 하니 미리 더 쟁여 놓아야 겠어요 강아지간식 강추 입니다 🩵
reviews.content_en:
🐷BITE ME's new Pork Coin Chips launched today!🐷

The BITE ME Coin Chips treats have already been verified with other flavors, and now a new flavor is out?????
Honestly... the crispy texture and the satisfying crunch when chewing is like ASMR but so cute!!!
With top-notch palatability and packed with domestic pork, this new BITE ME Coin Chip product 🫶🏻
All the other flavors are delicious, but this new one looks amazing too.... They're doing an early bird discount event for the 5/26 (Friday) launch, so I need to stock up in advance! Highly recommend for dog treats 🩵

reviews.name: 나****
reviews.content:
바잇미 부스팅 코인칩 치킨
다 품절이네요!
계속 서치하다가
오!
낱개별로
아이들 눈 건강에도 좋고
너무 맛있게 아그작 아그작
잘 먹기에
4봉 더 추가 주문했습니다!
다소 좀 가격이 있고
내용량은 적어도 
우리 아이들
눈건강에 좋고
잘먹는데 
하나도 아깝지 않네요!
특히 상품설명 하나하나
처음부터 끝까지 읽어보면
좋은제품끼리 배합
좋은곳에서 만들고
대한민국 제품
우리 아이들을 위해
많이 겟 해야지 이 생각뿐!
잘 먹고 잘 싸고 잘 놀고 잘 자고 아프지않고
건강하면 그만!
배송받은
바잇미 부스팅 코인칩 치킨(눈건강)
잘 먹이겠습니다!

아! 세련된 디자인과 색상
그리고
뜯는 부분이 매우 편해서
열고 닫기 좋은 아이디어 부분도
높이 살만함!

좋은 간식 만들어 주셔서 감사해요!
맥주 마시다가 저도 모르게 손이 갈뻔
안주인줄 알고 (봉투 디자인과 색상이 이쁨)
사람이 먹는 과자 봉투 같은 느낌 진짜!

앞으로도 좋은 간식 많이 만들어 주시고
바잇미 부스팅 코인칩 치킨(눈건강)
이벤트 행사도 디스카운트도 
많이 해주시길 바랄게요! ^^
reviews.content_en:
BITE ME Boosting Coin Chips Chicken
Everything's sold out!
Keeping my eyes peeled...
Oh!
They have individual packages
Good for the pups' eye health and
They munch munch so deliciously
That I ordered 4 more packs!
It's a bit pricey
And the quantity is small
But for our babies
It's good for their eye health
And they eat it so well
I don't regret it one bit!
Especially after reading the product description
From beginning to end
Quality ingredients combined well
Made at a good facility
A Korean product
For our babies
All I can think is I gotta get more!
Eating well, pooping well, playing well, sleeping well, not getting sick
If they're healthy, that's all that matters!
The BITE ME Boosting Coin Chips Chicken (eye health)
We received in shipment
Will be fed with care!

Oh! The sleek design and color
And
The tear-off part is so convenient
The easy open and close mechanism is
Really worth praising!

Thank you for making such a great treat!
I was drinking beer and almost reached for it by mistake
Thinking it was a snack ㅋㅋ (the pouch design and color are so pretty)
It really looks like a snack pouch for humans!

Hoping for more great treats going forward
BITE ME Boosting Coin Chips Chicken (eye health)
I hope you'll do lots of events and discounts! ^^

reviews.name: 강****
reviews.content:
바잇미 간식은 성분도 좋고 기호성도 좋아서 언제나 걱정 없이 먹이고 있는데요, 이번에 새로 출시된 바잇미 부스팅 코인칩 치킨 역시도 기호성은 말할 것도 없이 너무너무 좋구요 성분 또한 방부제 없이 저온 건조한 자연 간식이라 안심하고 먹일 수 있어요 :) 그리고 바잇미 코인칩은 너무 쉽게 부서지지도 않고 그렇다고 너무 딱딱하지도 않아서 반려견이 먹기에 딱 알맞고 부스러기도 적게 생겨서 좋아요 ! 보통은 간식으로 하나씩 주지만 가끔씩 사료를 잘 안 먹을 때도 잘게 부셔서 사료 위에 토핑으로 얹어주니 아주 잘 먹더라구요 ☺️♥️

+) 바잇미 코인칩을 먹이면 댕댕이들의 오도독오도독 세상에서 제일 귀엽고 사랑스러운 ASMR도 들으실 수 있으니 고민 마시고 한 번 구매해 보세요 반려견도 보호자님도 모두 다 만족하실 거예요 ٩(๑❛ᴗ❛๑)۶♡
reviews.content_en:
BITE ME treats always have great ingredients and palatability, so I feed them with no worries. This newly launched BITE ME Boosting Coin Chips Chicken also has amazing palatability, and the ingredients are a natural treat dried at low temperature without preservatives, so I can feed with peace of mind :) And BITE ME Coin Chips don't break too easily and aren't too hard, so they're just right for dogs to eat, and there aren't many crumbs! Usually I give one as a treat, but sometimes when my pup doesn't eat kibble well, I crumble it up and sprinkle it on top of the food and she eats really well ☺️♥️

+) When you feed your pup BITE ME Coin Chips, you get to hear the crunch crunch sound - the cutest and most adorable ASMR in the world! So don't hesitate and give it a try - both your pup and you will be so satisfied! ٩(๑❛ᴗ❛๑)۶♡

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
평소에도 코인칩 소고기랑 오리 포장지만 부스럭대도 자다가 호다닥 뛰어오는데 
이번에 또리가 사랑하는 닭고기까지!

📌바잇미 부스팅 코인칩 치킨은 신선한 닭가슴살 원육과 단호박+당근으로 만들어져서 눈 건강에 영양만점 간식이랍니다 ◡̈

오도독 씹어 먹는 소리 들으면 듣고 있는 언니까지 스트레스 해소되는 느낌ㅎ

📌맛은 당연히 만족이고 이번에 개봉 방식까지 너무 편하게 바뀌어서 역시 바잇미.. 이런 사소한 것까지 신경써서 신제품 출시하는구나라고 느꼈답니다 ❛˓◞˂̵  

영혼을 담아 사진 찍는데 밑에서 주라고 두 발로 서고 코로 툭툭 치고 쌩난리...

앞으로도 코인칩은 정기적으로 구매 예정이랍니다 ヽ( ᐛ )ノ
reviews.content_en:
Even just the rustle of the Coin Chips packaging in beef and duck flavors gets him jumping out of bed, but now chicken too that Tori loves! 📌BITE ME Boosting Coin Chips Chicken is made from fresh chicken breast and sweet pumpkin + carrots, so it's a nutrition-packed treat for eye health ◡̈

Hearing that satisfying crunch when chewing even relieves stress for me listening in ㅎ

📌The taste is obviously satisfying and the opening method has changed to be so convenient this time, so I really felt that BITE ME puts thought into even these small details when launching new products ❛˓◞˂̵

He stands on his hind legs begging, nudging with his nose, making a fuss...

I plan to keep buying Coin Chips regularly going forward ヽ( ᐛ )ノ

reviews.name: C****
reviews.content:
다른 간식은 닭가슴살이라 해도 방부제 사용했을지, 과다한 가공으로 영양성분 없을지 걱정 되는데 코인칩은 닭가슴살, 당근, 단호박 좋은 원료로 HAACP 인증 받은 human grade 간식이라 안심하고 먹일 수 있어서 좋아요. 화식처럼 저온으로 구워서 영양성분도 다 그대로구요 😄

무엇보다 강아지가 너무 좋아해서 봉지에 막 달려 들어요ㅋㅋ

먹이거나 휴대하기도 엄청 편리해요. 파우치 자체도 지퍼가 있고, 묻어나거나 으깨지지 않는 형태면서 너무 딱딱하지 않고 냄새도 안 나서 주머니나 간식 파우치에 몇개 따로 넣고 다니기도 좋아요. 

똑! 하고 잘 부러지면서 부스러기가 많지도 않아서 사이즈/양 조절이 편리해요
reviews.content_en:
I used to worry about whether other treats with chicken breast actually used preservatives or lost nutritional value through over-processing, but Coin Chips is made with quality ingredients like chicken breast, carrots, and sweet pumpkin and has HACCP certification as a human-grade treat, so I can feed it with confidence. It's baked at low temperature like home cooking, so all the nutritional value stays intact 😄

Best of all, my dog loves it so much she dives right into the package ㅋㅋ

It's super convenient to feed and carry around too. The pouch itself has a zipper, it doesn't crumble or get messy, it's not too hard, and there's no smell, so I can easily toss a few in my pocket or snack pouch to carry around.

It snaps cleanly and doesn't leave many crumbs, so it's easy to adjust the size and amount!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
동네사람들〰️바잇미 열일하는 것 좀 보세요🤭
코인칩 비프/덕/치킨에 이어 💕포크💕 출시!

감사하게도 바잇미에서 출시 전에 또리에게 선물하고 싶다고 하셔서 언니가 호다닥 받아왔습니다!

⠀
🐽바잇미 부스팅 코인칩 포크는?
➰신선한 국내산 '돼지고기 뒷다리살 + 연근 + 시금치'가 듬뿍 들어가 건강한 단백질 섭취는 기본이고 피로회복은 뽀너스!
프로테아제와 프락토올리고당이 함유되어 있어 소화걱정 놉!

🐽보관 방법은?
➰리뉴얼된 지퍼백 형식이라 보관도 쉽고 부스러기가 없어서 깔끔하게 급여 가능!

(이부분 진짜 바잇미 감동! 지퍼백으로 되어있는 간식 잘 못 뜯으면 위에 부분 다 뜯기고 잡을 부분 없어서 열때마다 인내심 테스트...
근데 코인칩 포크는 리뉴얼된 지퍼백이라 손톱 자른 날도 열고 닫고 1초컷.)

🐽기호성? 
➰말해모해...없어서 못 먹지ㅠㅠㅠㅠ
(고기 제일 사랑하는 노알러지왕튼튼갱얼쥐한테 코인칩은 사랑...💕 + 시금치 원물까지 콕콕)
⠀

➰드디어 드래곤볼..아니 드래곤코인칩 4개나 모았다구요! 
모아놓고 보니 더 영롱쓰✨
다음엔 어떤 맛이 나올지 벌써부터 기대중 ( ื▿ ืʃƪ)

⚡5/26 금요일 바잇미 부스팅 코인칩 포크 신제품 오픈
⚡선착순 초특가 '6900원' 오픈이벤트 중이라고 하니 달려가자!
reviews.content_en:
Neighbors〰️check out BITE ME working hard 🤭
After Coin Chips in Beef/Duck/Chicken, now 💕Pork💕 is launched!

Thankfully BITE ME sent it as a gift for Tori before launch, and I rushed to pick it up!

⠀
🐽What is BITE ME Boosting Coin Chips Pork?
➰Fresh domestic pork hind leg + lotus root + spinach packed in generously for solid protein intake, plus bonus fatigue recovery!
Contains protease and fructooligosaccharide so no digestion worries!

🐽How to store?
➰It's a renewed zipper bag format so it's easy to store and has no crumbs for clean feeding!

(This part really impressed me about BITE ME! Treats in zipper bags are hard to open if you can't tear it right - you have to tear off the whole top and have nothing to grip, making opening a patience test every time...
But the Coin Chips Pork has a renewed zipper bag so you can open and close it in 1 second even with freshly trimmed nails.)

🐽Palatability?
➰Can't say much... she can't stop eating ㅠㅠㅠㅠ
(To the no-allergy, meat-loving Tuktuk gang, Coin Chips are love... 💕 + with actual spinach pieces sprinkled in)
⠀

➰Finally got 4 Dragon Balls... I mean Dragon Coin Chips collected!
Now that I look at them together they're even more sparkling ✨
Already looking forward to what flavor comes next ( ื▿ ืʃƪ)

⚡5/26 Friday BITE ME Boosting Coin Chips Pork New Product Launch
⚡First come first served special price '6900 won' - event going on now so let's go!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
바잇미 부스팅 코인칩 치킨🐔🩷 

애기 먹는거 보니까 건조 자연 간식은 처음이라 그런지 어떻게 먹는지 모르고 어색해 하더니 맛 보더니 진짜 오독오독 잘 씹어먹네요
닭고기 베이스로 단호박과 당근까지 영양만점 간식이라 그런지 더 맛있게 잘 먹습니다😆💕
지퍼팩으로도 되어있어서 보관하기 용이하네요👍
소고기맛도 있던데 그것도 애기한테 사줘보려고합니다‼️
HACCP 인증된 국내 제조사 생산으로 방부제 없이 제작 되었다 하여 믿고 먹이게 되네요😘

이번 체험을 통해서 맛있는 간식도 맛보고 알게 되었어요 좋은 기회 주셔서 감사합니다💖
reviews.content_en:
BITE ME Boosting Coin Chips Chicken🐔🩷

Seeing the baby eat it, since it's the first time with a dried natural treat, she seemed confused about how to eat it, but after tasting it she's crunching away so well
Since it's chicken-based with sweet pumpkin and carrots - a nutrition-packed treat - she eats it so much better😆💕
It comes in a zipper pack so it's easy to store 👍
They have beef flavor too so I want to try that with the baby too‼️
With HACCP certification and made domestically without preservatives, I feed it with confidence 😘

Through this experience, I got to taste and discover a delicious treat. Thank you for the great opportunity 💖
